highlights:
# Senior Technology Architect
...
Jersey City, NJOn-siteSeniorStaffBackendML / AIData Engineering
...
Senior AI architect at Bank of America leading enterprise-scale AI/ML implementations and data platform design for financial services, with responsibility for translating business strategy into secure, compliant technology solutions across multiple concurrent programs.
...
Python Spark PyTorch TensorFlow
...
Job Description:This job is responsible for defining an architectural vision and solution that supports the strategic outcomes of the Business' Products and Services. Key responsibilities include defining the target operating environment, designing for client resiliency, assisting with solution design, and defining non-functional requirements. Job expectations include working with stakeholders and service providers aligned to the Business' strategic objectives, evaluating the impact of strategic design decisions, and contributing to the architecture roadmap.
...
A senior technology architect responsible for leading the design, delivery, and scaling of advanced AI-driven solutions within a complex banking environment. The ideal candidate will bring over 10 years of financial services experience, combined with deep expertise in AI/ML, data platforms, and enterprise solution architecture.
...
In this role, you will act as a senior AI Solutionist, translating business strategy into scalable, secure, and compliant technology implementations that enhance customer experience, operational efficiency, and decision intelligence. You will oversee multiple concurrent programs, driving end-to-end delivery across cross-functional teams while ensuring alignment with regulatory and governance standards. Lead and mentor multiple agile teams, fostering a culture of innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement. You will collaborate closely with business, product, risk, and technology stakeholders to prioritize initiatives, manage dependencies, and ensure high-quality outcomes at scale. Strong leadership, strategic thinking, and the ability to navigate complex enterprise ecosystems are critical. Experience with large-scale AI implementations, data-driven platforms, and stakeholder management at executive levels is essential to succeed in this role.
...
### Required Qualifications
...
- 10+ years of experience leading the design, development, and enterprise-scale implementation of technology solutions within financial services.
...
- 5+ years of experience in AI/ML, data science, or advanced analytics, with a strong focus on delivering production-grade solutions.
...
- Proven experience acting as a senior AI solutionist, translating business needs into scalable, secure, and compliant architectures.
...
- Strong technical expertise in programming languages such as Python and SQL, with the ability to guide engineering and data science teams hands-on when needed.
...
- Deep understanding of machine learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn) and their application in enterprise environments.
- Strong knowledge of statistical modeling, data analysis, and AI-driven decisioning within regulated environments.
- Experience with large-scale AI implementations
...
- Experience with big data and distributed computing technologies (e.g., Hadoop, Hive, Spark, Salesforce, Data Lake house concepts) in large-scale enterprise ecosystems.
- Familiarity with on-prem-based AI platforms and modern data architectures (e.g., data lakes, semantic layers, orchestration frameworks).
- Proven track record of leading AI-driven transformation initiatives in banking or financial services.
...
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field.

My work focuses on LLMs, GenAI applications, fraud detection, NLP, and scalable ML platforms, taking models from research to real-world impact. results.title: SAI RAM
highlights:
Senior AI ML Engineer at [Bank of America](https://www.linkedin.com/company/bank-of-america)
...
### Senior AI ML Engineer at [Bank of America](https://www.linkedin.com/company/bank-of-america) (Current)
...
Supporting BOFA's enterprise AI initiatives, I work on the design, development, and operation of production-grade machine learning systems used within highly regulated financial environments. My focus is on delivering scalable, auditable, and reliable ML solutions that support fraud detection, transaction risk scoring, and data-driven decision workflows, while aligning with governance, security, and compliance requirements. I contribute across the full AI and ML lifecycle, including problem framing, data analysis, feature engineering, model development, validation, deployment, and monitoring in production. My work includes building and optimizing risk and fraud models operating on large-scale transactional data, helping reduce manual review effort and improve decision speed and consistency. I collaborate closely with data engineering, platform, security, and product teams to build cloud-native ML platforms supporting batch and near-real-time inference. This includes designing robust data ingestion pipelines, feature processing workflows, and secure model-serving APIs that integrate with enterprise systems. Strong emphasis is placed on model explainability, performance stability, and traceability, particularly where outputs impact financial controls or risk decisions. In addition to traditional ML, I support enterprise Generative AI initiatives, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions for internal knowledge access and analytical use cases. These solutions are implemented with governance, access control, audit logging, and monitoring embedded from the start to support responsible adoption. I work within Agile delivery models, partnering with stakeholders to translate complex business and regulatory requirements into production-ready AI solutions, while supporting operational stability through monitoring, incident analysis, and continuous improvement.

We are seeking a hands-on Senior Manager of Data Science to lead a high-impact team in developing the strategy, standards, and execution of AI across our content ecosystem. You will lead a team that embeds machine learning and generative AI directly into production systems operating at scale. This applied research role balances innovation with practical constraints (e.g. latency, cost, reliability), requiring a strong ability to quickly iterate on prototypes (e.g. “vibe coding”), communicate tradeoffs, and rapidly deploy to production environments. This role is central to our transformation toward an intelligent, agent-enabled content platform which is capable of grounded reasoning, turning structured and unstructured data sources into legal knowledge.
